name: Grade 1 Homestead Lab — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: Family and Consumer Sciences safety guidance
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Homestead Lab pathway.

units.title: Investigate: self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to self-care, organizing, safe home routines, and helpful contributions.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
